summary: The user is considering purchasing a new laptop, specifically the MacBook Air with the M1 chip, and seeks information on its features and value. They also discuss their recent upgrade to a Samsung Galaxy S22 Ultra from an iPhone 11 Pro, sharing their positive experiences with the device and the S Pen features.
facts: The user is considering purchasing a new laptop, specifically the MacBook Air with the M1 chip. The user has been using their new Samsung Galaxy S22 Ultra for a month, which they purchased from Best Buy. The user upgraded from an iPhone 11 Pro to the Samsung Galaxy S22 Ultra. The user enjoys the larger screen and S Pen features of the Galaxy S22 Ultra. The user has been using DeX mode on their Galaxy S22 Ultra for work on the go. The user finds the One UI interface of the Galaxy S22 Ultra to be manageable but is still getting used to it. The user uses the S Pen to take selfies and control music playback. The user takes notes during meetings using the S Pen and Samsung Notes app. The user has been using the S Pen with Adobe Illustrator Draw for creating simple designs and sketches. The user recharges the S Pen every few days, depending on usage.
